sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ الذَّهَابَ إِلَى الْبَحْرِ فِي الْإِجَازَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je odlučila otići na more za vrijeme odmora.
sentences.translationEn: The family decided to go to the sea during the holiday.

sentences.arabic: حَزَمُوا حَقَائِبَهُمْ وَانْطَلَقُوا صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ التَّالِي.
sentences.translation: Spakovali su kofere i krenuli sljedećeg jutra.
sentences.translationEn: They packed their bags and set off the next morning.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلُوا إِلَى الشَّاطِئِ بَعْدَ ثَلَاثِ سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Stigli su na plažu nakon tri sata vožnje.
sentences.translationEn: They arrived at the beach after three hours of travel.

sentences.arabic: لَعِبَ الأَطْفَالُ فِي الرَّمْلِ وَالْمَاءِ طُولَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su se igrala u pijesku i vodi cijeli dan.
sentences.translationEn: The children played in the sand and water all day long.
